title: Registration of Pearl Millet Cytoplasmic-Nuclear Male-Sterile Line ICMA-5
abstract: ICMA-5 cytoplasmic-nuclear male-sterile (CMS) line (Reg. no. GS-3, PI 597783) of pearl millet [Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br.] has a new cytoplasm (A5) for male sterility. This line was released in 1997 by the Genetic Enhancement Division, ICR1SAT Asia Center, Patancheru, AP, India. ICMA-5 was tested as 81 As.
